<tspan x="390" y="30">soumya@codr</tspan> -————————————————————————————————-—-
<tspan x="390" y="50" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Role</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> ................ </tspan><tspan class="value">Full-Stack Developer</tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="70" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Education</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> ........... </tspan><tspan class="value">B.Tech CSE (AI/ML), Polaris SoT '29</tspan>

<tspan x="390" y="110" class="cc">. </tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="130" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Stack.Frontend</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> .......... </tspan><tspan class="value">React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS</tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="150" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Stack.Backend</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> ........... </tspan><tspan class="value">Node.js, Express, Flask</tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="170" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Stack.Data</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> .............. </tspan><tspan class="value">PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Prisma</tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="200">- Contact</tspan> -—————————————————————————————————————

<tspan x="390" y="240" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">LinkedIn</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> ............ </tspan><tspan class="value">soumya-sagar-44812a371</tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="260" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Portfolio</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> ........... </tspan><tspan class="value">soumya-codr.github.io</tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="290">- GitHub Stats</tspan> -—————————————————————————————-—-
<tspan x="390" y="310" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Repos</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> .. </tspan><tspan class="value">94</tspan> | <tspan class="key">Followers</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> .... </tspan><tspan class="value">39</tspan> | <tspan class="key">Following</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> .. </tspan><tspan class="value">161</tspan>

<tspan x="390" y="380" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Contributing to</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> .......... </tspan><tspan class="value">Gemini CLI, Wagtail, AsyncAPI</tspan>
<tspan x="390" y="400" class="cc">. </tspan><tspan class="key">Recognized by</tspan>:<tspan class="cc"> ............ </tspan><tspan class="value">Zulip, NexFellow</tspan>
</text> -->

<line x1="15" y1="515" x2="970" y2="515" stroke="#22243f" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="15" y="540" fill="#9a95b5" font-size="13px">Badges</text>
